content.text: A New Look, A Better Experience: Website Redesign and Accessibility Improvements
for a more user-friendly, easily maintained website

our applications and prepare for upcoming changes and innovations in the software world.

sections.title: Changes to SOS Website Before and After

elements.alt: Screenshot of the old North Carolina Secretary of State website homepage featuring a banner for Rural RISE NC.
Screenshot of the new North Carolina Secretary of State website homepage featuring an updated, cleaner layout and new navigation menus.
Screenshot of the WAVE web accessibility evaluation tool analyzing the new website, showing 0 errors, 0 contrast errors, 23 alerts, and 25 features.
Comparison showing 'What we did' with yellow buttons and blue text, and 'How color blind sees it' displaying the buttons in grayscale, demonstrating that sufficient contrast is maintained.
Screenshot of the old Lobbying search page.
Screenshot of the new Lobbying search page showing updated styling and layout.

content.text: Icons as links with no link names

elements.alt: Screenshot of the old search results page showing a complex data table, icons used as links, and a yellow informational banner.
Screenshot of the new search results page displaying entries in an accessible list format with clear 'File annual report' buttons, replacing the old table format.
Screenshot of the old search results displayed as a dense table.
Screenshot of the new search results displayed as clean, expandable list items.

sections.title: After examples of accordions on new site

elements.alt: Example of collapsed accordion panels for search results.
Decorative background graphic.
Decorative background graphic.
Example of an expanded accordion panel showing detailed information for a specific search result, including status, expiration date, and links.
Screenshot of Lobbying Compliance Results showing an expanded accordion panel for an individual, displaying links for File Registration, File Amendment, and other actions.
Screenshot of a business entity search result expanded in the new accordion layout.
Screenshot of the same business entity search result with the 'File Annual Report' button prominently highlighted in yellow.
Screenshot of 'Find a Notary' web page showing search fields for address and city, and a map.
Screenshots of 'Find A Notary' and 'Find a Notary Near You' search forms with fields for Address, City, State, and Zip.

content.text: Make sure your buttons have a Minimum height and Width of 44 Pixels

elements.alt: Illustration of a finger tapping on a mobile button that is appropriately sized, demonstrating the 44 pixel rule.
Screenshot of the Secretary of State website featuring 'Remote Electronic Notarization Rulemaking'.
Screenshots of the Lobbying Compliance Division webpages showing 'What We Do' and 'Contact Lobbying' sections.

content.text: Develop consistent and accessible forms and templates across all divisions.
Identify long term solution for the PDFs
Update all publications and ADA standards for public facing written materials
Develop a change control process for Subject Matter Experts (SMEs) managing web content.
Accessibility and UX trainings for content developers
Develop more Video Tutorials and HTML Manuals
